project_description: Enterprise-grade IoT Connectivity Management Platform for telecom operators. Manages cellular IoT subscriptions, SIM cards, network provisioning, billing, and customer relationships.

glossary.Census: Parties, accounts, customer management bounded context
glossary.Iungo: SIM cards, network elements, sales bounded context
glossary.Motus: Usage data, CDR processing bounded context
glossary.ICP: IoT Connect Provisioning — saga-based provisioning pipeline
glossary.CDR: Call Detail Record — raw usage event from the network
glossary.SCM: SIM Card Management — external SIM management system

style_notes: Polish headers: only first letter capitalized (not Title Case)
Use Lucide icons via Docusaurus components instead of emoji
Bold for UI elements, code for technical values

team_conventions: MUnit + Cats Effect for new tests
